name: ALX ONCOLOGY HOLDINGS INC
business: ALX ONCOLOGY HOLDINGS INC is a clinical-stage biotechnology company developing novel therapies for cancer. Its lead product candidate, evorpacept, is a CD47 blocker designed to overcome hematologic toxicities of other CD47 blockers, evaluated in combination with anti-cancer antibodies for various cancers. Its second candidate, ALX2004, is an EGFR-targeted antibody-drug conjugate with a topoisomerase I inhibitor payload, in Phase 1 for EGFR-expressing solid tumors.

exposures.sentence: Evorpacept is a next-generation CD47 blocking therapeutic that we believe has significantly enhanced properties compared to competing CD47 blocking approaches.
ALX2004 is a novel EGFR-targeted antibody-drug conjugate with a differentiated mechanism of action.
We believe that a biomarker-driven approach incorporating CD47 expression may optimize patient selection for evorpacept combinations in subsequent development.

catalysts.event: First patient dosed in ASPEN-09-Breast Phase 2 trial for HER2-positive breast cancer
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, we announced that the first patient had been dosed in the trial.

catalysts.event: First patient dosed in ALX2004 Phase 1 trial for EGFR-expressing solid tumors
catalysts.sentence: In August 2025, we announced the dosing of the first patient in the first-in-human, open-label multi-center Phase 1 clinical trial of ALX2004 for the treatment of advanced or metastatic select EGFR-expressing solid tumors.

catalysts.event: ALX2004 Phase 1 trial began enrolling third dose cohort at 4 mg/kg
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, we announced that the trial had begun enrolling patients in the third dose cohort at 4 mg/kg after successfully clearing the second dose cohort.

catalysts.event: FDA guidance that ASPEN-06 data not eligible for accelerated approval
catalysts.sentence: In April 2025, we received guidance from the FDA that the ASPEN-06 Phase 2 trial data evaluating Evo-TRP was not eligible for submission for accelerated approval given the availability of ENHERTU.

catalysts.event: Presented pre-planned exploratory analysis of ASPEN-06 at SITC 2025
catalysts.sentence: In November 2025, we presented a pre-planned exploratory analysis of the ASPEN-06 clinical trial in gastric cancer in which CD47 overexpression was identified as a key predictive biomarker for response and durable benefit in patients with retained HER2 expression.

On February 2, 2026, the Company completed a registered offering and issued an aggregate of 76,979,112 shares of common stock at an offering price of $1.57 per share and pre-funded warrants to purchase 18,574,120 shares of common stock at an offering price of $1.569 per pre-funded warrant.

tamClaims.claim: Over 450,000 patients live with the target tumor types (NSCLC, HNSCC, CRC, ESCC) in metastatic stage in the US alone.
tamClaims.sentence: Importantly, this group of tumor types represents a significant unmet need with over 450,000 patients living with these tumors in the metastatic stage in the US alone.
